plugins.name: dhpk
plugins.description: Reusable Claude Code harness — 25 role-based agents (incl. the Swift/Xcode build-resolver, the silent-failure-hunter error-handling auditor, the artifact-reviewer Markdown-DSL gate, and Python/Rust build-resolvers), ~70 commands, ~57 core skills, 8-slot sentinel-driven review hooks (code/db/sec/frontend/doc/polyfill/migration/artifact), opt-in stack modules across PHP (5.6, 7.4, 8.x), Yii (1.1), PHPUnit (5.7, 9, 10, 11), Laravel (6–11), JS, the library-author cross-cutting module, and an iOS/Swift suite (swift, swiftui, ios-platform, swift-testing, xcode-tooling) with SwiftLint post-edit + xcodebuild/SPM pre-commit hooks. Wrapper-dispatch hook extension model, parallel Codex CLI tree.
